local_port.window: q_L active for first frozen update only and reopens before newly written Mf can be read
local_port.excluded_from_primary: m_minus_to_c_remains_open; any complete readout bundle is a separate longer_horizon extension
local_port.first_update_diagnostic: Y_L_direct(l)=sum_Omega uptake; E arms are structurally identical at t0 and this diagnostic cannot estimate E
local_port.factorial_estimand: Y_H_star_a(l,e) at the first E-reachable horizon H_star derived from the static update graph; local simple effects are later total effects of the transient t0 edge deletion
local_port.local_cone_obligation: fixed Omega deletes only the spatial m_plus_to_uptake edge; escaped outside readout remains residual or dynamic-E and forbids a complete-local claim
local_port.longer_horizon_policy: Y_total_H_a is secondary; complete local-state access is unclassified absent a fixed complete stencil causal cone; tracker-following support forbidden
local_port.claim_limit: conditional necessity or sufficiency of declared existing m_plus_to_uptake edge; not storage locality, complete local access, or ownership

environmental_port.window: active from t0 through statically fixed H_star
environmental_port.global_up_ref_formula: S_B_E=S_B0+e*(S_B(t)-S_B0); n_B_E=n_B0+e*(n_B(t)-n_B0); up_ref_E=(S_A(t)+S_B_E)/(n_A(t)+n_B_E), exact frozen empty-set rule
environmental_port.reservoir_formula: R_N_E=F*(N0-N_E); reservoir is not independently held
environmental_port.incoming_semantics: all outside_neighbor_to_target_destination dependencies regardless of realized flux sign
environmental_port.outgoing_policy: target_to_environment destination updates remain frozen and unmodified
environmental_port.conservation_policy: directed intervention imbalance is logged and may compel STOP; symmetric face gating is not silently substituted
environmental_port.common_probe_policy: algebraically separated, held identical, and excluded from E factor; failure to decompose exactly makes E inadmissible
environmental_port.claim_limit: access from declared post_t0 dynamic incoming environmental/common innovations relative to retained reference; not total E0, erasure of embodied environmental information, autonomy, or unrestricted ownership taxonomy

conditional_factorial_semantics.L0E0: declared m_plus_to_uptake edge off and post_t0 dynamic E innovations held; baseline E information and other Mf edges remain

open_conservative_extension.required_branch: if plan is None or fully_open then delegate directly to frozen_engine.step
open_conservative_extension.identity: Extended(S,L1E1) byte_equals Frozen(S) for arbitrary registered finite synthetic states
open_conservative_extension.forced_neutral_identity: qualification-only active q_L=1, active e=1, and joint active kernels in both orders byte_equal Frozen(S)
open_conservative_extension.parameter_policy: ordinary frozen parameters including eta_w are identical in Stages B and C

alternatives.lambda_plus_only: primary transient Phase-C local port; narrow existing-edge necessity and later total consequences only
alternatives.complete_Mf_readout_bundle: future separately named longer-horizon and full-cone-qualified extension only
alternatives.outside_contribution_multiplier: reject: nonlinear face has no unique outside summand and zeroed Laplacian parent creates sink
alternatives.symmetric_face_permeability: reject as primary because it creates a compartment and blocks outgoing paths
alternatives.localized_N_probe: probe factor only; no new Mf coupling allowed

stage_C_primary: q_L cuts only the t0 update then reopens; E hold runs through statically fixed first E-reachable Y_H_star_a; first-update Y_L_direct is a local-edge diagnostic and local H_star effects are later total effects of the transient cut; longer Y_total_H_a is secondary
